goal: Close remaining compiler gaps: type conversion chains, math functions, stub cleanup

milestones.title: InexactError + Type Conversion Fix
milestones.description: Fix InexactError invoke compilation so bounds-checked conversions (Int32(Float64(x)), round()) work correctly. Root cause of 3 pre-existing test failures.

stories.title: Trace InexactError invoke compilation path
stories.completedNote: Root cause: exits_outermost optimization in stackified.jl GotoNode handler used ssa_locals for SSA values defined in destination block (uninitialized). Fix: check vid bounds before using ssa_local.
stories.description: The IR pattern: fptosi(Int32, %x) → goto happy_path, InexactError(:Int32, Int32, %x) → throw → unreachable. The fptosi SSA value returns 0 instead of the computed value. Trace through codegen to find where the local assignment breaks.

stories.title: Fix InexactError invoke so fptosi SSA values survive
stories.completedNote: Added bounds check in stackified.jl:2024 — only use ssa_locals[vid] for return optimization when vid is defined outside destination block. +31 tests fixed.
stories.description: Fix the compiler so that SSA values defined in the happy path of bounds-checked conversions are properly stored in locals and available at merge points.

stories.title: Verify type conversion chains + round() closures pass
stories.completedNote: 1558 pass, 0 fail, 122 error, 6 broken. All 31 previously failing tests now pass. Zero regressions.
stories.description: Verify: Float32(Int32(Float64(x))), Int64(round(Float64(x)*2.0)), and the 3 pre-existing test failures now pass.

milestones.title: Stub Cleanup
milestones.description: Replace fake return values with proper UNREACHABLE or real implementations.

stories.title: Audit all hardcoded-return stubs
stories.description: parse_int_literal→0, str_substr→unchanged, Pointer.ptr→0, string field lookup→0. Determine which are hit by real code paths vs dead code.

stories.title: Replace reachable stubs with UNREACHABLE or real impl
stories.description: For each stub: if reachable in tests, implement properly. If dead code, replace with UNREACHABLE + comment.

milestones.title: Math Function Fixes (log, atan, exp2, etc.)
milestones.description: Fix stackifier/codegen issues causing 150+ math test failures. Lower priority — not blocking Therapy.jl.

stories.title: Categorize math failures: wrong values vs WASM trap
stories.description: log/atan return wrong values (stackifier SSA bug). exp2/log2/etc. produce invalid WASM (trap on instantiate). Different root causes.

stories.title: Fix exp2/log2/exp10/log10 WASM validation errors
stories.description: These functions produce WASM that traps on instantiate — likely type mismatch in generated code.

stories.title: Fix log/atan wrong return values
stories.description: These compile but return incorrect values — stackifier SSA value tracking issue.
